positive: A stylized illustration of a friendly, whimsical forest guardian spirit, depicted as a mix of flowing moss, gentle luminous flora, and subtle crystalline structures. The spirit should be central and symmetrical, standing amidst stylized bamboo stalks and glowing bioluminescent mushrooms. The overall aesthetic is ethereal and magical, utilizing a limited, cool color palette of jade greens, deep sapphire blues, and soft luminescent yellows. Emphasize clean, vector-like silhouettes and crisp linework suitable for screen printing. Composition should be highly symbolic and decorative, perfect for placement on an upper chest area. Style: Neo-Celtic knotwork meets Mid-Century stylized illustration. High contrast with glowing accents against a dark, solid background.
negative: blurry, bokeh, noise, grainy, watermark, signature, text, logo, trademark, realistic, photorealism, dirty, cluttered, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poor resolution, artifacts
